steps.title: Evaluate all choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — $4{x}^{2}+24$: matches the distributed result. That confirms A is correct.
  • Choice B — $4{x}^{2}+10$: adds 4 to 6 instead of multiplying. Eliminated.
  • Choice C — $4{x}^{2}+6$: does not distribute 4 to the 6. Eliminated.
  • Choice D — $4{x}^{2}-2$: incorrect arithmetic. Eliminated.
